ddt:Target.Name: T4_HFM_DDT2000_SW4_1_5
ddt:Target.Description:
v2.7.1 Modification of DataInKey screen
v2.7.2 Modification of HFM general configuration screen
v2.7.3 Mise à jour des organes : READ_RKE_IO_1,READ_RKE_IO_2,READ_HFM_VEHICLE_STATUS_HISTORY_1,READ_HFM_VEHICLE_STATUS_HISTORY_2,READ_HFM_VEHICLE_STATUS_HISTORY_3,READ_MONITOR_EEPROM,READ_RESET_COUNTER
v2.7.4 Modification of data enum: - Vehicle status trigger x - SES Trigger x - SES Failure Trigger x
v2.7.5 Addition of reprog request
v2.7.6 Modification of enum : - SES_TRIGGER_x
v3.1.0 - Add of possibility to write configuration VSC_WARNING_BATTERY_THRESHOLD_LEVEL in VSC Configuration screen Modification of size of following requests: - SR_IMMO_ECU_OR_CID_PAIRING_REWORK - SR_IMMO_ECU_AND_CID_PAIRING_GENESIS - SR_IMMO_CID_PAIRING_AFTER_SALES - SR_IMMO_ECU_PAIRING_AFTER_SALES - SafetyLine discontinuity parameter is renamed "Sensorline discontinuity"
v3.1.1 Modification of WAKE_UP_TIME_S_X enum
v3.1.2 modification of SES_TRIGGER_31 enum
v3.1.3 Modification of the screen VSC Configuration and change of the default value for DONGLE_CF
v3.1.4 Add of General screen Creation of LOCK_FORBIDDEN_NUM (numeric parameter for LOCK_FORBIDDEN) for ESCL automatic validations needs
v4.0.0 Modification of CAN IDs
v4.0.1 Modification of FFC_PROTOCOLE_TYPE_CF
v4.1.2 Parameter RKE_IDE_RECEIVED_FRAME deleted
v4.1.3 Modification of Basic Part List of HFM references
v4.1.4 Modification of Vehicle State DID name Add of 82 and 87 projects
v4.1.5 Modification of display of calibration: ESCL_SPEED_FOR_INHIB_OFF_TP ESCL_STOP_VEHICLE_SPEED_THRESHOLD_TP LONG_RF_POLLING_ACTIVATION_TM_TP Modification of data "start diagnostic session" => 10C0 Modification of maintenability report Deletion of data reference for sent data. Officialization

Data.Name: Additional pairing data MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
ApprovalNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: Certificate

Data.Name: AT_CF
Data.Comment: Set when the automatic gear box shall be configured.

Data.Name: CF_VSC_WAC_Buzzer_inhibited
Data.Comment: Current value saved in case of reset

Data.Name: CKC_PHIOC_CB
Data.Comment: CKC calibration

Item.Text: Max L3 turning ON timeout has expired
Stop by customer (start button press) when ignition was OFF
Brake or Clutch pedal initial conditions were not OK at start sequence init
Brake or Clutch pedal initial conditions are not OK when L3 turning ON has succeed
Starting Sequence Abortion due to non-respect of transmission conditions (clutch switch max travel failure present)
Starting Sequence Abortion due to non-respect of blanked BCM
Starting Sequence Abortion due to non-respect of transmission conditions (neutral contact failure present)
Starting Sequence Abortion due to non-respect of transmission conditions (no failure on neutral contact nor on clutch switch max travel)
Starting Sequence Abortion due to non-respect of engine short or long relaxation
Independent engine running without start sequence
BCM can’t communicate with USM by CAN
Last start sequence was a success
Stop by customer (start button press) when ignition was ON
Cranking relay switched on and off by USM
Cranking was not allowed by AT ECU
No start sequence initiated since last reset
auth level2 not auth without l3 turning ON
auth level2 not auth with l3 turning ON

Data.Name: CrcOfLogSave
Data.Comment: Record CRC

Data.Name: DateOfReprogramming
Data.Comment: Programming Date, BCD coded

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Item.Text: Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: signal has too few transitions / events
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
signal has too many transitions / events
circuit short to battery or open
circuit short to ground or open
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding/ General Failure Information
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Data.Name: FEEDBACK_WAC_1_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of the first part of the jingle WAC

Data.Name: FEEDBACK_WAC_2_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of the second part of the jingle WAC

Data.Name: IMMO_COUNTER_REMAINING_IGNITION_BEFORE_APV_CODE_ERASING
Data.Comment: This value is updated with the IMMO_COUNTER_IGNITION_S value (stored in E2P) at each APC raised and in case of reset.

Item.Text: CID not in Reader or not belonging to the vehicule
No Problem on antennas or com reader
No Problem on IDE and PSW
Problem IDE received not PSW if no other default
CID not in Reader or not belonging to the vehicule
No Problem on antennas or com reader
No Problem on IDE and PSW
Problem IDE received not PSW if no other default

Data.Name: IMMO_STATE_REWORK_MODE_ROOT_ERROR
Data.Comment: Reason of the none entry in Rework mode

Item.Text: Each time a new request seedis received
Each time the BCM received a request seed
Each time the BCM received a request seed
Each time the ECU received a request seed
Each time the BCM received a request seed

Data.Name: JINGLE_FREQUENCY_WAC_1
Data.Comment: PWM Frequency of the first part of jingle signal

Data.Name: JINGLE_FREQUENCY_WAC_2
Data.Comment: PWM Frequency of the second part of jingle signal

Data.Name: LONG_PRESS_TOLERANCE_TP
Data.Comment: Long press frame tolerance

Data.Name: NumberOfReprogrammings
Data.Comment: Programmation Number

Item.Text: Tension d'entrée du SR trop faible
Tension d'entrée du SR trop haute
Tme out de tension SR non atteinte
Tension de sortie du SR trop haute
Tension de sortie du SR trop basse

Data.Name: PPCC+12_Sur_Alim_Du_Lecteur_Badge
Data.Comment: Short to supply on card reader

Data.Name: PPCCMasse sur alim du lecteur badge
Data.Comment: Short to ground on card reader

Data.Name: PPCommLecteur de badge
Data.Comment: Failure on card reader serial line comm, detected also if supply failure

Data.Name: PPTrpAntenna
Data.Comment: Problem on card reader informations exchange

Data.Name: ProgrammingSiteReference
Data.Comment: Programming Site

Data.Name: ProgrammingToolReference
Data.Comment: Programming Tool

Item.Text: ended NOK 0x0D time out CID pairing
ended NOK 0x04 pb writing codes in CID or BCM memory
ended NOK 0x05 CID blank or not of vehicle
ended NOK 0x06 CID already paired in this procedure
ended NOK 0x07 routine to pair a Valet card launched whereas one Valet card paired
ended NOK 0x0C pb storage pairing context in CID
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID not belonging to the vehicle
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok CID blank not the one pre-presented
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Only one Rest Access Card paired to the ECU
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Routine to pair Restricted Access Card whereas 1 already paired
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID blank for ECU pairing or CID not belonging to the vehicle for ECU or CID pairing
rep nok CID already paired in this procedure of pairing
rep nok Only one Rest Access Card paired to the ECU
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing
rep nok storage of data NOK in CID
rep nok CID blank or not belonging to the vehicle
rep nok Configuration Restricted Access Card not ok
Transponder of the reader not available
pb storage pairing context in CID
Time out CID pairing in Key configuration
IGN OFF before end of pairing

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: STACK_LOAD
Data.Comment: Provide the value of stack depth measured by SWP. (WITH_DEBUG_FRAME_CF shall be activated)

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: TIME_OUT_INTER_FRAMES_TP
Data.Comment: Confidential

Data.Name: TIME_OUT_RECEIVE_DONGLE_CODE_TP
Data.Comment: Confidential

Data.Name: TimeOfReprogramming
Data.Comment: Programming hour, BCD coded

Data.Name: VAC_Nb_AuthentNonReussi
Data.Comment: Incrémentation du compteur sur 2 octets à chaque authent VAC non réussie Sauvegarde E2PROM

Data.Name: VSC Badge_SC1
Data.Comment: Card out of card reader

Data.Name: VSC Badge_SC2
Data.Comment: Card seen in card reader

Data.Name: VSC BadgeFreq_315N
Data.Comment: 315MHz card seen in card reader

Data.Name: VSC BadgeFreq_315R
Data.Comment: Limited 315MHz card seen in card reader

Data.Name: VSC BadgeFreq_433
Data.Comment: 433MHz card seen in card reader

Data.Name: VSC BadgeFreq_433K
Data.Comment: Badge 433 mHz type Corée présent dans le lecteur. 0 par défaut.

Data.Name: VSC Code_IDE
Data.Comment: Laste card IDE authenticated or identified

Data.Name: VSC IDE_reçu_par_tranpondeur
Data.Comment: Card IDE read by card reader

Data.Name: VSC IDE_Valid_reçu_par_transpondeur
Data.Comment: Card IDE valid

Data.Name: VSC N°DuDernierBadge_Start_Stop
Data.Comment: Number of last card used for starting, stopping

Data.Name: VSC N°DuDernierBadgeAuthentifié
Data.Comment: This value is updated only after an authentification of the card in the Reader. After a power on of the BCM, the default value is not reliable ( not necessary 0).

Data.Name: VSC Nb_Authent_Total_CondaML
Data.Comment: Hands free locking counter.

Data.Name: VSC Nb_Authent_Total_DeCondaML
Data.Comment: Hands free unlocking counter, saved in EEPROM

Data.Name: VSC Nb_Authent_Total_DemML
Data.Comment: Hands free starting counter.

Data.Name: VSC Nb_Authent_Total_Wac
Data.Comment: WAC locking counter, saved in EEPROM

Data.Name: VSC Nb_AuthentNonRéussi_CondaML
Data.Comment: Hands free unachieved locking counter.

Data.Name: VSC Nb_AuthentNonRéussi_DeCondaML
Data.Comment: Hands free unachieved unlocking counter, saved in EEPROM

Data.Name: VSC Nb_AuthentNonRéussi_DemML
Data.Comment: Hands free unachieved starting counter.

Data.Name: VSC NbTotalDeBadge_433K_Appris
Data.Comment: La valeur courante n'est pas perdue en cas de reset

Data.Name: VSC PSWTag
Data.Comment: ast password received during card exchange

Item.Text: Pairing done or time out reached
Problem PSW not received or writing codes failed or failure authen.
No Problem on antennas or com reader
Problem IDE not received OR Key locked OR pairing complete for all keys OR Key pairing already performed OR wrong APV code OR exit diag

Data.Name: VSC Status_d'Authent
Data.Comment: Authentication status by card reader or antennas

Data.Name: VSC_ Count _Resync_ID4 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage Après l’apprentissage badge ID4, Valeur = 1 Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 4 ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID ) - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC__UserIdentification
Data.Comment: Actualised on each authentication or identification

Data.Name: VSC_Apprentissage Verrou APV autorisé pour 10 minutes
VSC_COMPT_ECHECS_DEPROT_INJ
Data.Comment: Unchieved unprotecting requests counter

Data.Name: VSC_Count _Resync_ID1 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Valeur par défaut = 0 Après l’apprentissage badge ID1, Valeur = 0 Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 1 ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID ) - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC_Count _Resync_ID2 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Valeur par défaut = 0 Après l’apprentissage badge ID2, Valeur = 1 Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 2 ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID ) - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC_Count _Resync_ID3 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Valeur par défaut = 0 à l’apprentissage Après l’apprentissage badge ID3, Valeur = 1 Incrémentation à chaque resynchronisation du badge 3 ( suite désynchro RKE ou Start Routine ANALYSE_CUSTOMER_ID ) - La valeur courante est conservée en cas de reset.

Data.Name: VSC_ECU voit INJECTION vierge ou codée
VSC_Etat Verlog ECU
Data.Comment: Result of the exchanges UCH ECM: protection state for BCM

Data.Name: VSC_Identifier_Inhibited 4 bits
Data.Comment: Number of learn cards

Item.Text: ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule
ID vu et connu dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule
ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule
ID vu et connu dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule
ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule
ID vu et connu dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule
ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule
ID vu et connu dans la zone couverte par les antennes intérieures du véhicule

Data.Name: VSC_Learning_Step sur 5 bits.
Data.Comment: Different steps of card learning routine

Item.Text: Authentification avec ISK de transport CID_MNGR_OPEN_BLANK_CID_SESSION
Authentification avec ISK de transport afin de sélectionner les pages User CID_MNGR_VALID_USER_PAGE
Authentification avec ISK de transport afin de sélectionner les pages Remote CID_MNGR_VALID_REMOTE_PAGE
Authentification avec ISK calculé à partir du code APV CID_MNGR_OPEN_CID_SESSION
Authentification avec ISK du véhicule CID_MNGR_OPEN_STD_SESSION

Data.Name: VSC_NbResync_Failed_ID1 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Card1 resynch failure counter, saved in EEPROM

Data.Name: VSC_NbResync_Failed_ID2 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Card2 resynch failure counter, saved in EEPROM

Data.Name: VSC_NbResync_Failed_ID3 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Card3 resynch failure counter, saved in EEPROM

Data.Name: VSC_NbResync_Failed_ID4 1 octet modulo 256
Data.Comment: Card4 resynch failure counter, saved in EEPROM

Item.Text: ID vu et connu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule
ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule
ID vu et connu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule
ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule
ID vu et connu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule
ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule
ID vu et connu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule
ID non vu à dans la zone couverte par les antennes LF extérieures du véhicule

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_LOCK_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of Switch Off Disturber message

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_SearchT1_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of card search in period T1

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_SearchT2_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of card search in period T2

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_SearchT3_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of card search in period T2

Data.Name: VSC_WAC_Window_TP
Data.Comment: Global duration of card search in WAC mode

Data.Name: VSC_Warning_Battery_Level_Identifier
Data.Comment: Authorize or not warnings on the cluster. Current value saved in case of reset

Item.Text: Inhibe les alertes au tableau de bord
Valide les alertes au tableau de bord.

Data.Name: VSC_Warning_Battery_Threshold_Level
Data.Comment: Low level threshold of low battery detection

Data.Name: VSC-Status_Switch_Transponder
Data.Comment: Card reader switch state

Data.Name: WAC_PAUSE_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Duration of the silence in the PWM Signal

Data.Name: Output Control Command
Data.Comment: Command enumeration

Data.Name: JINGLE_DELAY_TM_TP
Data.Comment: Delay between WAC locking & WAC jingle

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

DataItem.Name: PPCCMasse sur alim du lecteur badge
VSC_ECU voit INJECTION vierge ou codée
VSC_Apprentissage Verrou APV autorisé pour 10 minutes
Additional pairing data MSB to LSB
After Sales Code MSB to LSB
Additional pairing data MSB to LSB

DeviceData.Name: PPCCMasse sur alim du lecteur badge
VSC_ECU voit INJECTION vierge ou codée
VSC_Apprentissage Verrou APV autorisé pour 10 minutes

Label.Text: VSC Type (VSC1 / VSC2 practical / VSC2 magic)
Attention. Lors du changement d'une des configs parmis les 4, les autres configs seront également changées à la valeur défini!
Pour le Dongle cela peut emmener à empêcher le démarrage du Vehicle. Avant de faire le changement de configuration, lisez les configurations actuelles et copiez-les dans les valeurs à changer.
PPCCMasse sur alim du lecteur badge

Display.DataName: PPCCMasse sur alim du lecteur badge

Label.Text: VSC_ECU voit INJECTION vierge ou codée
VSC_Apprentissage Verrou APV autorisé pour 10 minutes

Display.DataName: VSC_ECU voit INJECTION vierge ou codée
VSC_Apprentissage Verrou APV autorisé pour 10 minutes

Screen.Name: Factory Rework BCM or CID PAIRING

Label.Text: FACTORY REWORK : HFM or Customer ID pairing
1) Complete the "After Sales code" ( 16 bytes) and press the button "ENTER REWORK MODE"
2) If the REWORK MODE for HFM pairing is launched, then insert a customer ID belonging to the vehicle in the reader or switch Ignition Power Supply ON
4) Once all the customer IDs are paired, select "Validate", and press the button "EXIT REWORK MODE"
3) Press the button "Pairing" to pair a customer ID
2) If the REWORK MODE for customer ID pairing is launched, then insert a customer ID (belonging to the vehicle or blank) in the reader or switch Ignition Power Supply ON
3) Press the button "HFM pairing" to pair the HFM
4) If the HFM is paired, the EXIT of the REWORK MODE is automatic, Then done the pairing of all the customers IDs (procedure in blue)

Input.DataName: After Sales Code MSB to LSB

Label.Text: FACTORY PAIRING of ESCL or ECM ( Rework )

The pairing of the ESCL or ECM in factory is done automatically once the HFM and the customer IDs have been paired after the press on the push to start of the vehicle or after the switch to Ignition Power Supply ON

Display.DataName: VSC_ECU voit INJECTION vierge ou codée

Label.Text: Protected Pairing : HFM pairing in After Sales
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
2) Press the button "Request Server HFM pairing"
3) Select the "Input Data Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
4) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"

5) If the HFM is SA unlocked for HFM pairing then insert the customer ID belonging to the vehicle in the reader or switch Ignition Power Supply ON and press the button "HFM pairing" to pair the blank BCM.
After the pairing, the exit is automatic. If the HFM is not SA unlocked , press ABANDON
Protected Pairing : Electrical Steering Column Locked pairing in After Sales
2) Check that the HFM is not blank and the ESCL is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ESCL information "SteeringLock Blanck/coded"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
6) If the HFM is SA unlocked for ESCL pairing then put the Ignition OFF by removing the customer ID from the reader and then press the button "Authorize ESCL pairing"
7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then insert the customer ID in the reader.If the ESCL is paired ( "SteeringLock Blanck/coded" = 0) the exit of the procedure is automatic.
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ESCL press the button below
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
Protected Pairing : Engine Control Module (ECM) pairing in After Sales
2) Check that the ECM is blank (try to start the vehicle) and read the ECM information " VSC_UCH voit INJECTION vierge ou codée"
3) Press the button "Request Server ECM pairing"
4) Select the "Input Data to Server" (19 bytes) and copy it in the application "Pairing using DDT2000".
5) Complete the frames in the application and press the button "Calcul".Get the "Server answer" (16 bytes) and copy it in this screen. Then press the button "Transmit Server Answer"
1) You need first to connect to the application "Pairing using DDT2000" : https://gco.intra.renault.fr:14053/gco/ctrl/login and enter your IPN and Password. Then come back to this screen.
6) If the BCM is SA unlocked for ECM pairing then put the Ignition Power Supply OFF by removing the customer ID from the reader/antitheft contactor and then press the button "Authorize ECM pairing"

7) If the authorization to pair is ok, then insert the customer ID in the reader and press the START/STOP button of the vehicle or switch Ignition Power Supply ON. If the ECM is paired, the exit of the procedure is automatic
8) To postpone the authorization to pair the ECM press the button below

Display.DataName: VSC_ECU voit INJECTION vierge ou codée
